name: deadleaf_13b10_recommended_profile

mtf_profile.purpose: Match Imatest-style MTF20/30/50 as closely as possible without altering the acutance path.

acutance_profile.purpose: Improve Acutance agreement while leaving the MTF threshold readout path unchanged.

notes: The high-frequency guard is Acutance-specific and should not be used to tune MTF20/30/50.
Acutance estimates a conservative noise PSD scale from the measured high-frequency noise share, while the MTF threshold-readout path remains at 1.0.
The guard is implemented as a cosine taper from guard_start_cpp to guard_stop_cpp in the acutance path only.
For the current dataset, guard_start_cpp around 0.36 is the best practical tradeoff between curve MAE and Computer Monitor MAE.
The adaptive acutance noise scale is a quadratic function of the measured high-frequency noise share over 0.36 to 0.5 c/p.
Small Print and Large Print presets additionally apply an ideal low-pass display MTF with a cutoff of 18 cycles/degree.
Quality Loss is reconstructed from OM = max(0, 0.8851 - Acutance) using a global quadratic fit.
